Test Case Description:
1. Activate in GoogleMaps guidance
2. Attempt quiIDCEvo turn-by-turn instructions successions by pressing Google Maps UI
Test Case Expected Result: 1. HU plays audio on AAP navigation source.
Test Case Precondition:
1. BT, Wifi active on HU
2. Android auto functionality is enabled
3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
create recordings folder with create_recordings_folder() and start screen recording for HU with start_screen_recording(f"-s {HU}", test_name, "HU").
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
click Bluetooth icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth_2.png").
click Manage Devices Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Manage devices").
click Smartphones Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Smartphones").
click Android Auto icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Android_Auto.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Android_Auto_2.png"). Use the following input tap command to click the icon correctly: adb shell input tap {x+20} {y+20}.
check if x and y coordinates from Android Auto icon searching are different from 0 with x==0 and y==0. If they are 0 then the Mobile device doesn't support Android Auto and the test is skipped.
click Start button on HU with regex and coordinates with x, y = find_word_on_device_via_regex_with_coordinates(HU,"Start"). Use the following input tap command to click the button correctly: adb shell input tap {x} {y+400}.
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input tap 1050 125 to click Search button on Android Auto to search for a destination.
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input tap 1100 230 to click Android Auto navigation interface to select a destination.
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input tap 900 230 to attempt quick turn-by-turn instructions successions by pressing Google Maps UI.
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input tap 1000 550 to click Start button on Android Auto to start guidance for the selected destination.
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input tap 900 175 press Google Maps UI again for navigation guidance.
run the following adb command on HU: adb logcat | findstr /I "AudioFocus AudioManager" to extract the logs for audio playing during Android Auto navigation guidance. 
check if HU plays audio on AAP navigation source by verifying navigation audio pattern "Audio session started, type: GUIDANCE" from logcat output with audio_focus_started == True. If it is True, then HU plays audio on AAP navigation source and the test is Passed. If not then AAP navigation audio routing failed and the test is failed.please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_results\Screenshots.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed, failed or skipped) with the corresponding message.
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input tap 850 1100 press Google Maps UI for closing navigation guidance.
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input keyevent 3 to go to HU home screen.
click Bluetooth icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth_2.png").
click Manage Devices Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Manage devices").
click Smartphones Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Smartphones").
click Android Auto disconnect icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Android_Auto_disconnect.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Android_Auto_disconnect_2.png"). Use the following input tap command to click the icon correctly: adb shell input tap {x+20} {y+20}.
run the following commands after test is done in order to return to home menu: HU commands: adb shell input keyevent 3 one time; adb shell rm /sdcard/*.png; Mobile device commands: rc = phone.run_home_command().
stop screen recordings on HU after test is done with stop_screen_recording("HU") and keep them if test is failed or delete them if test is passed.

Test Case Description: 1. Perform a phonecall while in AndroidAuto
Test Case Expected Result:
1. Phonecall is the main audio source
2. Phonecall is hearable
3. Music is paused while in phonecall
Test Case Precondition:
1. BT, Wifi active on HU
2. Android auto functionality is enabled
3. MD already connected to AndroidAuto
Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
create recordings folder with create_recordings_folder() and start screen recording for HU with start_screen_recording(f"-s {HU}", test_name, "HU").
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile1 phone number with phone_number_mobile1 = phone.get_phone_number_command().
click Bluetooth icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth_2.png").
click Manage Devices Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Manage devices").
click Smartphones Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Smartphones").
click Android Auto icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Android_Auto.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Android_Auto_2.png"). Use the following input tap command to click the icon correctly: adb shell input tap {x+20} {y+20}.
check if x and y coordinates from Android Auto icon searching are different from 0 with x==0 and y==0. If they are 0 then the Mobile device doesn't support Android Auto and the test is skipped.
click Start button on HU with regex and coordinates with x, y = find_word_on_device_via_regex_with_coordinates(HU,"Start"). Use the following input tap command to click the button correctly: adb shell input tap {x} {y+400}.
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input tap 550 700 to go to HU Android Auto call menu.
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile3 = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device3 object with phone3 = create_device(Mobile3,mobile_name3).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone3.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile3 phone number with phone_number_mobile3 = phone3.get_phone_number_command().
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.run_turn_screen_on_command() to turn Mobile3 screen on.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.run_unlock_screen_command() to unlock Mobile3 screen.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.dial_command(phone_number_mobile1) to initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. Wait 5 seconds for the incoming call to be established.
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device(1, status).
run the following function on Mobile device1: rc = phone.answer_call_command() to answer the call from Mobile device3.
check if last 3 digits of mobile3 phone number can be found on HU display with x,y = find_word_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png", last_3_digits). If it was found then phonecall is the main audio source, phonecall is hearable, and music is paused while in phonecall and the test is Passed. If not then phonecall audio functionality while in Android Auto failed and the test is failed.
please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_results\Screenshots.
run the following function on Mobile Device1: phone.end_call_command() in order to end call.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed, failed or skipped) with the corresponding message.

click Android Auto disconnect icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Android_Auto_disconnect.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Android_Auto_disconnect_2.png"). Test Case Description:
1 Start playing music on Mobile Device.
2 Initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1.
3 End call.
Test Case Expected Result:
1 Audio playbaIDCEvo is initiated on HU.
2 Audio playbaIDCEvo is paused and/or song is muted.
3 Audio playbaIDCEvo resumes.
Test Case Precondition:
Mobile Device and HU are connected.
Synchronisation is finished.
Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
create recordings folder with create_recordings_folder() and start screen recording for HU with start_screen_recording(f"-s {HU}", test_name, "HU").
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile1 phone number with phone_number_mobile1 = phone.get_phone_number_command().
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.play_audio_command() to start playing music on Mobile Device.
run the following command on HU: adb shell input tap 1225 1325 to open Media menu.
click Source button with regex on HU display with found = click_on_device_regex(HU, "Source").
click Bluetooth name on HU from Media menu with regex and coordinates with x, y = find_word_on_device_via_regex_with_coordinates(HU,"Bluetooth").
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile3 = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device3 object with phone3 = create_device(Mobile3,mobile_name3).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone3.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile3 phone number with phone_number_mobile3 = phone3.get_phone_number_command().
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.run_turn_screen_on_command() to turn Mobile3 screen on.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.run_unlock_screen_command() to unlock Mobile3 screen.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.dial_command(phone_number_mobile1) to initiate an incoming call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. Wait 5 seconds for the incoming call to be established.
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device(1, status).
run the following function on Mobile device1: rc = phone1.answer_call_command() to answer the call from Mobile device3.
run the following function on Mobile device1: rc = phone1.end_call_command() to end the call.
run the following command on HU: adb shell input tap 1225 1325 to open Media menu.
check if audio playback resumes after call ends by verifying if Bluetooth audio source is active again with found = find_word_on_device_via_regex(HU, "Bluetooth"). If it was found then audio playback is initiated on HU, audio playback is paused and/or song is muted during call, and audio playback resumes after call and the test is Passed. If not then audio resume functionality failed and the test is failed.
please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\\traget\\IDCevo\\IOP_configuration\\Test_results\\Screenshots.
run the following function on Mobile Device: phone.pause_audio_command() to pause audio.
click Bluetooth button with regex on HU display with found = click_on_device_regex(HU, "Bluetooth").
click Radio button on HU from Media menu with regex and coordinates with x, y = find_word_on_device_via_regex_with_coordinates(HU,"Radio") to switch from mobile playback to radio.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed, failed or skipped) with the corresponding message.
run the following commands after test is done in order to return to home menu: HU commands: adb shell input keyevent 3 one time; adb shell rm /sdcard/*.png; Mobile device commands: rc = phone.run_home_command().
stop screen recordings on HU after test is done with stop_screen_recording("HU") and keep them if test is failed or delete them if test is passed.

Mobile Device and HU are connected.

Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().

run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile1 phone number with phone_number_mobile1 = phone.get_phone_number_command().
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.

get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.

extract the mobile3 phone number with phone_number_mobile3 = phone3.get_phone_number_command().
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device(1, status).
click Mobile device name button with regex from HU display with found = click_on_device_regex(HU, mobile_name).

click last 3 digits from Mobile number 3 button from HU display with found = click_on_device_regex(HU,last_3_digits).
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
run the following function on Mobile Device1: phone.answer_call_command() in order to answer call.
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device(1, status).
run the following command on HU: adb shell input tap 1225 1325 to open Media menu.
click Source button with regex on HU display with found = click_on_device_regex(HU, "Source").
click Bluetooth name on HU from Media menu with regex and coordinates with x, y = find_word_on_device_via_regex_with_coordinates(HU,"Bluetooth").

check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
create recordings folder with create_recordings_folder() and start screen recording for HU with start_screen_recording(f"-s {HU}", test_name, "HU").
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
click Bluetooth icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth_2.png").
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.enable_airplane_mode_command() to simulate putting Mobile Device in shielding bag or shielding chamber. Wait 5 seconds with airplane mode enabled.
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.disable_airplane_mode_command() to disable airplane mode.
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.run_linkloss_command() to simulate getting Mobile Device out of shielding bag or shielding chamber. Wait 15 seconds for bluetooth connection to be re-established.
check if Audio icon can be found on HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Mobile_Audio.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Mobile_Audio_2.png"). If it was found then Bluetooth connection is re-established and Audio icon is visible on the display of the HU and the test is Passed. If not then Bluetooth connection was not re-established after removing from shielding and the test is failed.
please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_results\Screenshots.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed or failed) with the corresponding message.
run the following commands after test is done in order to return to home menu: HU commands: adb shell input keyevent 3 one time; adb shell rm /sdcard/*.png.
stop screen recordings on HU after test is done with stop_screen_recording("HU") and keep them if test is failed or delete them if test is passed.

For TestraIDCEvos and Testcases set mode Fahren: "Pruefen_Analyse_Diagnose".
Test Case Expected Result:
2 Head Unit sleeps.
3 Call audio is audible on Mobile Device 1.
4 After a couple of seconds call audio should be transfered to HU.
Audio should be audible on both sides.
Test Case Precondition:
Mobile Device and HU are paired.
Synchronisation is finished.
Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile1 phone number with phone_number_mobile1 = phone.get_phone_number_command().
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile3 = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device3 object with phone3 = create_device(Mobile3,mobile_name3).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone3.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile3 phone number with phone_number_mobile3 = phone3.get_phone_number_command().
run the following adb commands on HU: adb root; adb pull /data/misc/bluetooth/logs/btsnoop_hci.log btsnoop_hci_before_poweroff_transfer.log; adb pull /data/misc/bluetooth/logs/btsnoop_hci.log.last btsnoop_hci_before_poweroff_transfer.log.last; move btsnoop* D:/traget/IDCevo/IOP_configuration/Test_results in order to extract BTsnoop logs from HU before power off.
run the following function: power_off_HU() on HU to power off HU. Wait 10 seconds for HU to completely power off.
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device_1(1, status).
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.run_turn_screen_on_command() to turn Mobile3 screen on.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.run_unlock_screen_command() to unlock Mobile3 screen.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.dial_command(phone_number_mobile1) to initiate call from Mobile Device 3 to Mobile Device 1. Wait 5 seconds for the incoming call to be established.
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.answer_call_command() to answer the call.
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device_1(1, status).

run the following command in Windows cmd to resume DLT logs after reboot: ssh -i id_ed25519_idcevo -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@160.48.249.99 "nohup dlt-receive -a localhost -o /var/data/{mobile_name_without_space}.dlt >/dev/null 2>&1 &".

run the following adb commands on HU: adb shell device_config put bluetooth INIT_default_log_level_str LOG_VERBOSE to restart BTsnoop logging after power on.
run the following 2 adb commands on HU: adb shell am start -a android.settings.LOCALE_SETTINGS; adb shell input swipe 1200 500 2000 200 to Navigate on Language Menu.
click English Button from HU display with regex with found = click_on_device_regex(HU, "English"). If found == False run the following adb commands on HU: adb shell input tap 200 700; adb shell input swipe 1200 500 2000 200 then click English button again with found = click_on_device_regex(HU, "English").
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input tap 3000 650.
check if last 3 digits of mobile3 phone number can be found on HU display with found = find_word_on_device_via_regex(HU, last_3_digits). 1 Initiate an incoming call from MD3 to MD1
2 Reject incoming call on IDCEvo
Test Case Expected Result: 2 IDCEvo and MD indicate the rejected call
Test Case Precondition:
Mobile Device and HU are connected.
Synchronisation is finished.
Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create recordings folder with create_recordings_folder() and start screen recording for HU with start_screen_recording(f"-s {HU}", test_name, "HU")(example for HU).
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile1 phone number with phone_number_mobile1 = phone.get_phone_number_command().
click Mobile device name button with regex from HU display with found = click_on_device_regex(HU, mobile_name).
click Contacts Button on from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU, "Contacts").
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile3 = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device3 object with phone3 = create_device(Mobile3,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone3.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile3 phone number with phone_number_mobile3 = phone3.get_phone_number_command().
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.run_turn_screen_on_command() to turn Mobile3 screen on.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.run_unlock_screen_command() to unlock Mobile3 screen.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.dial_command(phone_number_mobile1) to initiate an incoming call from MD3 to MD1. Wait 5 seconds for the incoming call to be established.
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device(1, status).
click Reject button with regex from HU display with found = click_on_device_regex(HU, "Reject").
check if call was rejected by looking for rejected call indication on HU display with found = find_word_on_device_via_regex(HU, "Contacts"). if both HU and Mobile device indicate the rejected call then the test is Passed. If not then the call rejection was not handled properly and the test is failed.
please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_results\Screenshots.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed, failed or skipped) with the corresponding message.
run the following commands after test is done in order to return to home menu: HU commands: adb shell input keyevent 3 one time; adb shell rm /sdcard/*.png; Mobile device commands: rc = phone.run_home_command().
stop screen recordings on HU after test is done with stop_screen_recording("HU") and keep them if test is failed or delete them if test is passed.

check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with Mobile1, HU_dummy = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).

check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
get serial numbers for them with Mobile3, HU_dummy = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device3 object with phone3 = create_device(Mobile3,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone3.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.

run the following adb command on HU: adb shell input tap 3000 650.
please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_results\Screenshots.

create recordings folder with create_recordings_folder() and start screen recording for HU with start_screen_recording(f"-s {HU}", test_name, "HU")(example for HU).
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile1 phone number with phone_number_mobile1 = phone.get_phone_number_command().
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile3 = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device3 object with phone3 = create_device(Mobile3,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone3.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile3 phone number with phone_number_mobile3 = phone3.get_phone_number_command().
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device(1, status).
click Mobile device name button with regex from HU display with found = click_on_device_regex(HU, mobile_name).
click Contacts Button on from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU, "Contacts").
run the following function on Mobile device: rc = phone.run_turn_screen_on_command() to turn Mobile screen on.
run the following function on Mobile device: rc = phone.run_unlock_screen_command() to unlock Mobile screen.
run the following function on Mobile device: rc = phone.dial_command(phone_number_mobile3) to initiate a call to Mobile3.
wait 5 seconds for the call to start setting up.
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
run the following function on Mobile device3: rc = phone3.answer_call_command() to accept the call from Mobile1.
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device(1, status).
check if last 3 digits of mobile3 phone number can be found on HU display with found = find_word_on_device_via_regex(HU, last_3_digits). If it was found then call is active on Mobile Device and HU and audio is transmitted in both directions and the test is Passed. If not then call is not active properly and the test is failed.
please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_results\Screenshots.
run the following function on Mobile Device: phone.end_call_command() in order to end call.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed, failed or skipped) with the corresponding message.
run the following commands after test is done in order to return to home menu: HU commands: adb shell input keyevent 3 one time; adb shell rm /sdcard/*.png; Mobile device commands: rc = phone.run_home_command().
stop screen recordings on HU after test is done with stop_screen_recording("HU") and keep them if test is failed or delete them if test is passed.

Test Case Description:
1 Put Mobile Device in shielding bag or shielding chamber.
2 Get Mobile Device out of shielding bag or shielding chamber. Wait a few seconds.
Test Case Expected Result:
1 Bluetooth connection is released.
2 Bluetooth connection is re-established. Phone icon on display of HU is visible.
Test Case Precondition:
Mobile Device and HU are paired.
Mobile Device is connected as hands-free device (network indicator can be seen in the display of the HU).
To simulate the linkloss a shielding bag or shielding chamber is recommended.
Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
create recordings folder with create_recordings_folder() and start screen recording for HU with start_screen_recording(f"-s {HU}", test_name, "HU").
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
click Bluetooth icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth_2.png").
click Manage Devices Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Manage devices").
click Smartphones Button on from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Smartphones").
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.enable_airplane_mode_command() to simulate putting Mobile Device in shielding bag or shielding chamber. Wait 5 seconds with airplane mode enabled.
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.disable_airplane_mode_command() to disable airplane mode.
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.run_linkloss_command() to simulate getting Mobile Device out of shielding bag or shielding chamber. Wait 15 seconds for bluetooth connection to be re-established.
check if "Connected" word can be found on HU display with found = find_word_on_device(HU,"Connected"). If it was found then Bluetooth connection is re-established and Phone icon on display of HU is visible and the test is Passed. If not then Bluetooth connection was not re-established after removing from shielding and the test is failed.
please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_results\Screenshots.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed or failed) with the corresponding message.
run the following commmands after test is done in order to return to home menu: HU commands: adb shell input keyevent 3 one time; adb shell rm /sdcard/*.png.
stop screen recordings on HU after test is done with stop_screen_recording("HU") and keep them if test is failed or delete them if test is passed.

Test Case Description: 1 Initiate call from Mobile Device 1 (paired Mobile Device) to Mobile Device 3 during phonebook download.
Test Case Expected Result: 1 Outgoing call does not interrupt phonebook download.
Test Case Precondition:
Mobile Device and HU are connected.
Phonebook download has started and is not finished.
In case the download of the phonebook is already finished, then delete Mobile Device on HU
Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile1 phone number with phone_number_mobile1 = phone.get_phone_number_command().
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile2 = get_serial_number().
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device2 object with phone = create_device(Mobile2,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: sim_state = phone2.check_SIM_command(). If the command does not contain word LOADED Mobile device doesn't have SIM card on it and test is skipped.
extract the mobile2 phone number with phone_number_mobile2 = phone2.get_phone_number_command().
switch USB Matrix back to the port from the beginning with select_mobile_device(1, status).
run the following function on Mobile device: rc = phone.run_turn_screen_on_command() to turn screen on.
run the following function on Mobile device: rc = phone.run_unlock_screen_command() to unlock screen.
run the following function on Mobile device: rc = phone.dial_command(phone_number_mobile2) to initiate a call on Mobile2.
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status(). If USB Matrix is connected to port 1 then change it to port 2 and if is connected to any other port except port1 change the connection to port 1.
run the following function on Mobile device2: rc = phone2.answer_call_command() to accept the call from Mobile1.

Test Case Description:
1 Put Mobile Device in shielding bag or shielding chamber or go out of range to simulate a linkloss
2 Get Mobile Device out of shielding bag or shielding chamber or go in range.
Test Case Expected Result:
1 Bluetooth connection is released.
2 Bluetooth connection is re-established.
Test Case Precondition: Mobile Device and HU are connected.
Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
create recordings folder with create_recordings_folder() and start screen recording for HU with start_screen_recording(f"-s {HU}", test_name, "HU")(example for HU).
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
click Bluetooth icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth_2.png").
click Manage Devices Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Manage devices").
click Smartphones Button on from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Smartphones").
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.run_linkloss_command(). Wait 5 seconds with bluetooth module disabled.
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.run_linkloss_command(). Wait 15 seconds for bluetooth connection to be established.
check if Connected word can be found on HU display with found = find_word_on_device(HU, "Connected"). If it was found then HU and Mobile device had been reconnected after link loss and the test is Passed. If not then HU and Mobile Device were disconnected after link loss and the test is failed.
please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_results\Screenshots.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed or failed) with the message as in previous tests.
run the following commmands after test is done: HU command:adb shell input keyevent 3 one time; adb shell rm /sdcard/*.png.
stop screen recordings on HU after test is done with stop_screen_recording("HU") and keep them if test is failed or delete them if test is passed.

Test Case Description:
1 Navigate to Communication -> Select Manage mobile devices.
or
Press COM button on ZBE.
2 Scroll down to Settings and press ZBE.
3 Go to Bluetooth and uncheIDCEvo the cheIDCEvobox.
4 Wait 10 seconds.
5 CheIDCEvo the cheIDCEvobox Bluetooth.

3 Bluetooth connection is released.

5 Bluetooth connection is re-established.

check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().

run the following command in Windows cmd to resume DLT logs after reboot: ssh -i id_ed25519_idcevo -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@160.48.249.99 "nohup dlt-receive -a localhost -o /var/data/{mobile_name_without_space}.dlt >/dev/null 2>&1 &".

Test Case Description:
1 Activate Bluetooth on Mobile Device.
In order to be visible for other Bluetooth devices you have to enter the Bluetooth settings menu of your mobile device.

On HU press COM button on ZBE or go to Communication -> Manage mobile devices -> scroll down to Manage mobile devices -> select Connect new device. -> Select function Telephone.
2 On Mobile Device 1 select HU.
3 Confirm pairing request and all other requests that show up.
Test Case Expected Result:
1 HU can be found while Mobile Device 1 is searching for devices.
2 Bluetooth pairing request screen shows up on Mobile Device 1 and HU.
PIN code shown on both sides are the same.
3 Mobile Device 1 is successfully paired as Hands-Free Device 1 and as Bluetooth-Audio Device.
Test Case Precondition: Mobile Device 1 isn`t paired with HU.
Test Script Description:
check USB Matrix status with status = USB_Matrix_Status().
get serial numbers for them with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
create recordings folder with create_recordings_folder() and start screen recording for HU and for Mobile Device with start_screen_recording(f"-s {HU}", test_name, "HU")(example for HU).
get Mobile device bluetooth name with adb shell settings get secure bluetooth_name.
create Mobile device object with phone = create_device(Mobile1,mobile_name).
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.click_close_button_popup() to click Close button for pop ups that may appear on screen.
run the following function on Mobile device: rc = phone.run_turn_screen_on_command() to turn Mobile screen on.
run the following function on Mobile device: rc = phone.run_unlock_screen_command() to unlock Mobile screen.
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.run_settings_menu_command() go to Mobile Settings menu.
run the following function on Mobile device: rc = phone.run_bluetooth_menu_command() go to Mobile Bluetooth menu.
click Bluetooth icon from HU display with x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth.png") or x,y = find_icon_in_screenshot(f"{path}/screenshot.png",f"{path}/helpers/Bluetooth_2.png").
click Manage Devices Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Manage devices").
click Not now Button from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Not now").
click Smartphones Button on from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Smartphones").
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.click_close_button_popup() to click Close button for pop ups that may appear on screen.
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.enable_bluetooth() to enable Bluetooth for Mobile.
run the following function on Mobile device: phone.click_close_button_popup() to click Close button for pop ups that may appear on screen.
click Cancel Button on from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Cancel"). It may not appear everytime so we don't have an assert check for it.
extract bluetooth_device_name for HU in a variable using the following adb command: adb shell dumpsys bluetooth_manager | findstr -i "Name:".
click bluetooth_device_name button with regex from Mobile device display with found = phone.click_HU_bluetooth_name_button(bluetooth_device_name). This is the name of HU device we have to connect with Mobile.
click Connect Button on from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU, "Connect").
click Pair button from Mobile device display with found = phone.click_pair_with_HU_button().
run the following function on Mobile Device: phone.click_allow_button_popup() in order to click Allow button for pop ups that may appear on screen.
click Not now button from HU display two times with found = click_on_device(HU, "Not now"). It may not appear everytime so we don't have an assert check for it.
click Smartphones Button on from HU display with found = click_on_device(HU,"Smartphones").
click Not now button from HU display one time with found = click_on_device(HU, "Not now"). It may not appear everytime so we don't have an assert check for it.
check if Mobile global name word can be found on HU display with found = find_word_on_device(HU,mobile_name). If it was found then Mobile device has been connected successfully with HU and the test is Passed. If not then Mobile device name has not been found on HU Bluetooth devices list and the test is failed.
please make a screenshot on HU screen and save it on the path D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_results\Screenshots. 
save in Excel the status of the test (passed or failed) with the corresponding message.
run the following commmands after test is done in order to return to home menu: HU commands: adb shell input keyevent 3 one time; adb shell rm /sdcard/*.png; Mobile device commands: rc = phone.run_home_command().
stop screen recordings on HU and Mobile after test is done with stop_screen_recording("HU") and keep them if test is failed or delete them if test is passed.

Test Case Description: Write down the firmware version in the Description field
Test Case Expected Result:
eg. Base: M9615A-CEFWTAZM_4.0.111006
Kernel: 3.4.0
Build: L05E10d
Test Script Description:
test script is located in D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_environment\Test_scripts.
get the serial number for HU and Mobile device with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
run the following command: dir D:\ /s /b | findstr /r "traget.*IDCevo.*[0-9][0-9]w[0-9]*\.[0-9]*-[0-9].*images.*idcevo-hv.*Flashbins.*IDCEvo-Artifacts.*tools.*fastboot$".
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell getprop ro.build.fingerprint.
check if adb command returns the Firmware of the HU. If it returns the Firmware then the test is Passed. If not then test is Failed.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed or failed) with the corresponding message.

Test Case Description: Write down the OS in the Description field
Test Case Expected Result: eg. Android
Test Script Description:
test script is located in D:\traget\IDCevo\IOP_configuration\Test_environment\Test_scripts.
get the serial number for HU and Mobile device with HU, Mobile1 = get_serial_number().
run the following command: dir D:\ /s /b | findstr /r "traget.*IDCevo.*[0-9][0-9]w[0-9]*\.[0-9]*-[0-9].*images.*idcevo-hv.*Flashbins.*IDCEvo-Artifacts.*tools.*fastboot$".
run the following adb command on HU: adb shell "if [ -f /system/build.prop ] || [ -f /vendor/build.prop ]; then echo Android; else echo Unknown; fi".
check if adb command returns Android. If it returns Android then the test is Passed. If not then test is Failed.
save in Excel the status of the test (passed or failed) with the corresponding message.
